title: Section 34A
content: 1[34A. Prosecution on refusal to extradition.--Where the Central Government is of the opinion that a fugitive criminal cannot be surrendered or returned pursuant to a request for extradition from a foreign State, it may, as it thinks fit, take steps to prosecute such fugitive criminal in India.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 17, ibid., for section 34 (w.e.f. 18-12-1993).
